title: Miltonioides reichenheimii

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. taxonomy: Miltonioides reichenheimii is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the subtribe Miltoniinae.
